response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack developer but lacks the core requirements for this embedded security role. There is no evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency, no C/UNIX systems programming experience in the recent decade (only a brief NI LabWindows/CVI stint in 2014-2015), no Linux kernel work, and no exposure to LAN-switch firmware, MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF/SNMP, or chip-vendor SDKs. The profile is web/cloud-oriented (TypeScript, Node.js, D, MongoDB), which is a poor match for embedded networking security.
strengths: Long, stable software engineering career with senior/staff-level scope
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a developer-tools product
Comfortable with Linux environments, Docker, and CI/CD tooling
concerns: No indication of native or business-level Japanese language ability
No embedded firmware, Linux kernel, or LAN-switch / networking-protocol experience
Missing required security stack (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal, NETCONF, SNMP, chip SDKs)

key_factors.factor: Limited recent C and UNIX systems programming
